attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway rider who targets intermediate sprints and selective KOM points rather than aggressive climbing attacks. Chooses strategic moments to contest points rather than fighting for every opportunity.
team_tactics: Operates with significant autonomy in breakaways. Team allows him freedom to infiltrate early moves and manage his own KOM/sprint campaigns without heavy domestique support.
terrain_preference: Intermediate sprint finishes and breakaway scenarios suit him best. Strong enough to survive in mixed breaks but avoids committing energy on serious mountain stages when defending classifications.
vulnerability: Exposed in pure sprint finishes against experienced fast finishers. Strategic point management leaves him vulnerable to rivals who contest every climbing opportunity, as evidenced by polka dot jersey margin erosion.
key_patterns: Consistently infiltrates breakaways across multiple stages, showing strong break selection instincts (3 observations)
Prioritizes long-term classification defense over individual stage battles, banking energy strategically (2 observations)
Capable of contesting sprint finishes from reduced groups but loses to specialist sprinters (2 observations)
form_trajectory: positive: Demonstrated Tour-level maturity as debutant, competitive in finishes while managing KOM campaign intelligently
